description: ARCH-SENTINEL-1 / CI-ARCH-GATE-1 — Medical intelligence architecture guardrails (frame index, modifiers, Pass_3 isolation, promotion safety)

med_intel_no_raw_pass3_runtime_reads.description: Runtime and frontend must not read raw Pass_3 investigation specs.

med_intel_governance_non_runtime.description: Governance YAML artefacts declare runtime_consumed false and are not referenced by runtime code.

med_intel_promotion_safety_gate.description: pass3_frame_coverage_audit must not list naive safe_for_route_a_promotion without override.
